ohtani.title: Peter Lambert pitches a gem in Astros' win
ohtani.blurb: Peter Lambert throws seven shutout innings and Christian Walker homers in the Astros' 2-1 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
imanaga.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

suzuki.title: Michael Busch's heroics lift Cubs in walk-off win
suzuki.blurb: Michael Busch hits a game-tying homer and walks it off with a single in the Cubs' 3-2 win over the Reds

yoshida.title: Jarren Duran hits a go-ahead homer in Red Sox's win
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran hits a go-ahead home run and Payton Tolle strikes out eight in the Red Sox's 5-4 win over the Tigers

okamoto.title: Ben Williamson hits go-ahead single in Rays' 4-3 win
okamoto.blurb: Ben Williamson hits a go-ahead single to lead the Rays to a 4-3 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Angels belt three home runs in 4-3 win
murakami.blurb: Mike Trout, Jorge Soler and Zach Neto each homer as the Angels hang on for a 4-3 win over the White Sox
